artifacts.summary: Phase 1 analysis complete; identified core blocker and domain mismatch; 8 sorries remain

partial_progress.details: Completed architecture analysis. Identified that domain transfer approach requires proving forward_F/backward_P for ratFMCS, which inherits TimelineQuot gaps. Core blocker is timelineQuot_not_valid_of_neg_consistent sorry.

review_reason: Forward_F/backward_P for ratFMCS cannot be proven with current infrastructure. The staged construction edge cases (m > 2k) block the domain transfer approach. User should decide: (1) attempt to complete staged construction proofs, (2) try alternative completeness formulation, or (3) accept partial result.

completion_data.completion_summary: Completed Phase 1 analysis of domain transfer approach. Identified core blocker: forward_F/backward_P for ratFMCS cannot be proven without resolving staged construction edge cases.

errors.message: ratFMCS_forward_F blocked: canonical_forward_F witness may not be in TimelineQuot (m > 2k edge case)
errors.recommendation: Consider alternative approach: (1) prove staged construction includes all witnesses, (2) generalize completeness to Preorder domains, or (3) use different countermodel construction
